name: continue-codex-work
description: >- Recover actionable context from a prior Codex CLI session's local rollout files and continue interrupted work without running `codex resume`. Use this whenever the user wants to pick up Codex (OpenAI Codex CLI / GPT agent) work — they give a Codex session id, ask to continue what Codex was doing, say a Codex run was cut off mid-task, or want to inspect `~/.codex/sessions` rollout JSONL before resuming. This is the Codex counterpart of continue-claude-work: reach for it for Codex/`~/.codex` se
author: daymade
